name: Can I sue a coworker who caused my injury in Farmington?

mainEntity.name: Can I sue a coworker who caused my injury in Farmington?

acceptedAnswer.text: No for coworkers; yes for third-parties.[1]
acceptedAnswer.description: Generally no, co-employee immunity under comp; sue third-parties like contractors.[1] Prove duty/breach/causation for third-party.[1] Key factors: defective equipment claims. Comp first, then extra suit.[1] Consult for viability.

description: No for coworkers; yes for third-parties.[1]
